meaning: n.(计算机等的)正常运行时间
examples: The only argument against it is uptime.
Impeccable uptime can be matched, and your features copied.
Availability is measured in percent uptime divided by the total time.
And speaking of productivity, the uptime would be significantly increased for my staff too.
Many will claim that designing data centers for failure prevention and uptime assurance is cost-prohibitive.
